incident.title: 核心交易数据库主节点宕机导致全站交易中断
incident.title_en: Core Trading Database Primary Node Down Causing Full Site Transaction Outage

timeline.detail: 自动告警触发: 核心交易数据库连接失败率 > 90%，主节点无响应
timeline.detail_en: Auto-alert triggered: Core trading database connection failure rate > 90%, primary node unresponsive

timeline.detail: 根据值班表自动分配给 L1 运维值班人员
timeline.detail_en: Auto-assigned to L1 ops on-call based on rotation schedule

timeline.detail: 已确认告警，开始排查。初步判断为数据库主节点问题
timeline.detail_en: Alert acknowledged, starting investigation. Initial assessment: database primary node issue

timeline.detail: 尝试连接主节点失败，SSH 无响应。联系 IDC 机房确认服务器状态
timeline.detail_en: Failed to connect to primary node, SSH unresponsive. Contacting IDC to confirm server status

timeline.detail: 需要 DBA 专家介入处理数据库故障切换
timeline.detail_en: Need DBA expert involvement for database failover handling

timeline.detail: 分配给高级 DBA 处理紧急故障切换
timeline.detail_en: Assigned to senior DBA for emergency failover handling

timeline.detail: 确认主节点硬件故障（磁盘阵列损坏），准备执行主从切换
timeline.detail_en: Confirmed primary node hardware failure (disk array damaged), preparing to execute primary-replica failover

timeline.detail: 发现从节点数据同步延迟约 5 分钟，需要评估数据丢失风险
timeline.detail_en: Found replica node has ~5 minute sync delay, need to assess data loss risk

timeline.to: 架构师 + 业务负责人
timeline.detail: 数据同步延迟问题需要业务决策：是否接受可能的数据丢失进行切换
timeline.detail_en: Sync delay issue requires business decision: whether to accept potential data loss for failover

timeline.detail: 评估业务影响：当前每分钟损失约 50 万交易额，决定接受切换风险
timeline.detail_en: Business impact assessment: current loss ~500K CNY per minute in transactions, decision made to accept failover risk

timeline.detail: 开始执行数据库主从切换流程
timeline.detail_en: Starting database primary-replica failover procedure

timeline.detail: 主从切换完成，新主节点已上线。开始验证数据一致性
timeline.detail_en: Primary-replica failover completed, new primary node online. Starting data consistency verification

timeline.detail: 发现约 2000 笔交易数据不一致，需要从备份恢复
timeline.detail_en: Found ~2000 transactions with data inconsistency, need to restore from backup

timeline.detail: 数据恢复工作交给专业人员处理
timeline.detail_en: Data recovery work handed over to specialist

timeline.detail: 从增量备份定位到丢失的交易记录，开始数据补录
timeline.detail_en: Located missing transaction records from incremental backup, starting data recovery

timeline.detail: 数据补录完成，所有交易记录已恢复。核心交易系统已恢复正常
timeline.detail_en: Data recovery completed, all transaction records restored. Core trading system back to normal

timeline.detail: 监控指标恢复正常，交易成功率 99.9%，响应时间正常
timeline.detail_en: Monitoring metrics back to normal, transaction success rate 99.9%, response time normal

timeline.detail: 故障服务器已由 IDC 确认为磁盘阵列控制器故障，已安排更换
timeline.detail_en: IDC confirmed failed server has disk array controller failure, replacement scheduled

timeline.detail: 系统完全恢复正常运行，持续监控 1 小时无异常。故障原因：主节点磁盘阵列控制器硬件故障
timeline.detail_en: System fully restored to normal operation, 1 hour continuous monitoring shows no issues. Root cause: primary node disk array controller hardware failure

timeline.detail: 已确认业务完全恢复，数据完整性验证通过。后续将安排故障复盘会议
timeline.detail_en: Confirmed full business recovery, data integrity verification passed. Post-incident review meeting to be scheduled

root_cause.description: 核心交易数据库主节点的磁盘阵列控制器发生硬件故障，导致存储系统不可用，数据库服务中断
root_cause.description_en: Core trading database primary node's disk array controller experienced hardware failure, causing storage system unavailability and database service interruption

resolution.immediate_action: 执行数据库主从切换，将从节点提升为新的主节点
resolution.immediate_action_en: Executed database primary-replica failover, promoted replica to new primary
resolution.data_recovery: 从增量备份恢复约 2000 笔丢失的交易记录
resolution.data_recovery_en: Restored ~2000 missing transaction records from incremental backup
resolution.follow_up: 更换故障服务器，评估增加实时同步机制以减少故障切换时的数据丢失风险
resolution.follow_up_en: Replace failed server, evaluate adding real-time sync mechanism to reduce data loss risk during failover
